articles.title: ADA Ready To Roar Back To $1 As Cardano Founder Reveals Launch Date For Vasil Upgrade
articles.description: The Vasil hard fork is coming. Charles Hoskinson, the CEO and founder of IOG, the company behind Cardano, disclosed Friday when the long-delayed Vasil hard fork is likely to kick off.

articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Addresses Return of Cardano “Ghost Chain” FUD
articles.description: IOG founder says that “Ghost chain” FUD about Cardano chain is back, being spread by influencers

articles.title: Bitcoin, ETH, XRP, ADA Get Stuck In Tight Ranges As Investors Attune To The Jackson Hole Symposium
articles.description: On Friday, Bitcoin and Ethereum opened with their heads down, with the global crypto market volatility remaining suppressed for the week ahead of the much anticipated Jackson Whole Symposium.

articles.title: Here are the three biggest crypto stories of the past week

articles.title: When The Crypto Bear Or Bull Period Will Start, Analyzing The Facts
articles.description: August 26 is the long-awaited day for a critical shift in the crypto market price movements. At the end of today, the bears or the bulls will take over the market, although everyone hopes for a reversal of the bearish trend. articles.title: Ethereum Whales Shift Their Holding Into Reputable Exchanges
articles.description: Many people are already aware of the risks of trading or holding cryptocurrencies. Even those not overly concerned by the crypto market have some knowledge about the dangers. The volatility of certain digital currencies, such as Bitcoin and Ethereum, is why many individuals and firms seek ways to maintain the value of their assets.
